description: Commission Reconciliation — reconciles agent commissions, broker splits, referral fees, and transaction coordinator fees against the settlement statement. Blocks disbursement when totals do not balance or trust accounts are unverified.

hard_stops.label: Commission Not Reconciled Block Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Commission amounts on the settlement statement do not reconcile with the listing agreement and buyer broker agreement — block disbursement.

hard_stops.label: Fee Discrepancy Hold
hard_stops.logic: Fee discrepancy greater than $1 detected between agreed fees and settlement statement — hold for correction.

hard_stops.label: Trust Account Not Verified Block Commission Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Broker trust account has not been verified — block commission disbursement until account is confirmed.

soft_flags.label: Unusual Commission Rate
soft_flags.logic: Commission rate falls outside typical market range — flag for review.

soft_flags.label: Referral Fee Above Threshold
soft_flags.logic: Referral fee exceeds 25% of the commission — flag for compliance review.

soft_flags.label: TC Fee Above Market
soft_flags.logic: Transaction coordinator fee exceeds typical market rate — flag for review.
